headline: Capital One Completes Brex Buyout, Boosts Digital Payments Strategy
summary: COF completes $5.15B Brex acquisition, boosting its push into AI-driven business payments and financial software with major tech and integration plans.

headline: Jim Cramer on Capital One: “I Want You to Be Very Optimistic”
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is among Jim Cramer’s stock calls as he discussed the impact of the bond market. Mentioning that they have been in the house of pain for some time, a caller inquired if they should be optimistic over the next 12 to 24 months. Cramer stated: I want you to be […]

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Capital One Financial, Lowers Price Target to $260
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Donald Fandetti   maintains Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $280 to $260.
